series_metadata.series_description: The ODNR Office of Coastal Management maintains files related to applications for coastal erosion area permits in compliance with Ohio Revised Code Section 1506.07. Files may contain applications; correspondence; technical reviews, site assessments, and site photographs; executed permits; and post-authorization submittals.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: Permanent, unless replaced by a legible electronic version ; Electronic: Permanent
